name: B-Scada, Inc.
business: B-Scada, Inc. develops and sells software and hardware products for data visualization and monitoring in residential, commercial, and heavy industrial settings. Its primary products include HMI/SCADA software, an IoT cloud platform, and a line of wireless sensors for monitoring temperature, pressure, voltage, and water detection.
sellsTo: industrial engineers, graphic designers, computer programmers
manufacturing, building automation, water treatment, energy management

exposures.sentence: Our software solutions are reducing resource consumption, increasing productivity, and improving safety all over the world in industries like manufacturing, building automation, water treatment, energy management, and other fields of business relying on real-time data visualization and analytics to manage their processes.
B-Scada also markets and sells a line of wireless sensors used for monitoring various information like temperature, pressure, voltage and water detection.
The system monitors building automation performance electricity distribution, mining, manufacturing, aquaculture and petrochemical and is also used for line of business applications.

Our IoT Platform launched this spring has produced some initial customer wins, including an enterprise IT management solution for one of Taiwan's leading telecommunications companies, commercial office space monitoring in Africa and solar panels in Singapore.
The system monitors building automation performance electricity distribution, mining, manufacturing, aquaculture and petrochemical and is also used for line of business applications.
Companies who could use this technology include plumbing and building contractors and commercial farming applications.

Our IoT Platform launched this spring has produced some initial customer wins, including an enterprise IT management solution for one of Taiwan's leading telecommunications companies, commercial office space monitoring in Africa and solar panels in Singapore.

B-Scada also has IoT (Internet of Things) cloud-based and on premise solutions, that allow users to create powerful customized applications for Smart Cities (monitoring of various city attributes; i.e., traffic, pollution, energy usage) and remote monitoring.
Companies that install data centers and marinas could also leverage this technology.

catalysts.event: More aggressive promotion of IoT Platform and lightweight commercial sensors
catalysts.sentence: In 2016 we will begin to more aggressively promote our IoT Platform and lightweight commercial sensors and monitoring solutions.

catalysts.event: IoT initiatives revenue influence expected in early fiscal 2016
catalysts.sentence: New product and services revenue from our IoT initiatives will begin to influence our revenue in early fiscal year 2016.

catalysts.event: Hardware bundling with leading provider starts in Q2 2016
catalysts.sentence: B-Scada has also established relationships with a leading hardware provider who will start bundling our software with its hardware in Q2 2016.

catalysts.event: Agreement signed with electronic manufacturing firm for sensor development
catalysts.sentence: On May 1, 2015, B-Scada signed an agreement with an electronic manufacturing firm for the development of B-Scada sensors.
